intro: Government and technology sectors were the primary targets across 12 articles from mid-to-late April 2026, with Pro-Russia Hacktivists among the threat actors observed. The coverage included five specific CVEs, with CVE-2024-57726 carrying a CVSS score of 9.9 and CVE-2026-34197 scoring 8.8, alongside CVE-2024-1708, CVE-2024-20662, and CVE-2024-21412. Affected regions spanned the United States, North America, and globally, impacting critical infrastructure, energy, and IT. The severity mix comprised nine high-severity and three critical-severity incidents.
